positive: Minimalist circular emblem design featuring a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a pair of majestic, stylized deer antlers interwoven with glowing bioluminescent florals and winding vines. Surrounding the central elements are abstracted crescent moons and gentle constellations. Use a continuous line art style combined with bold, flat color blocking (digital screen print aesthetic). Palette: deep indigo, forest green, soft cream, and glowing cosmic lavender accents. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical, centered, and highly scalable for apparel. Strong contrast is key, with clean, solid silhouettes against a subtle gradient background. Vector art quality, tattoo flash style, perfect geometric balance, highly detailed illustration.
negative: blur, artifact, grain, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, lowres, cropped, realistic photo, 3d render, grunge
